indicatorDescription: CSO staff can explain project outcomes using credible monitoring evidence
evidenceType: Outcome paragraph, evidence worksheet, final test score

indicatorDescription: CSO teams use monitoring information in reflection or learning decisions
evidenceType: Learning meeting note, action decision, follow-up reflection

indicatorDescription: CSO can categorize community feedback and identify appropriate response or escalation pathway
evidenceType: Scenario score, categorization log, feedback response plan

indicatorDescription: CSO communicates safe, appropriate responses to community feedback
evidenceType: Redacted response log, feedback loop checklist

indicatorDescription: CSO can prepare an advocacy message using credible, non-sensitive evidence
evidenceType: Advocacy message draft, scenario decision, checklist score

indicatorDescription: CSO can identify and reduce risk in advocacy communication
evidenceType: Safe message review, risk checklist, fictionalized proof

indicatorDescription: Staff can identify sensitive concerns and choose safe referral or escalation steps
CSO staff can identify sensitive data and apply basic protection, anonymization, and sharing rules
